opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face suddenly turned bright red after I was in the garden today, it feels like it's burning, and I'm terrified my autoimmune condition is attacking my organs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up over a few hours after the sun and I'm scared it means a serious autoimmune condition flare.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 4 hours after afternoon sun
symptom_narrative.character: bright red, hot, tightly burning rash on the cheeks and nose
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both cheeks and across the bridge of the nose
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: burning rash; no chest pain on breathing, no breathlessness, no fever, no joint swelling, no cola urine or ankle swelling
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known positive ANA, previously no symptoms

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: positive ANA (told I have a autoimmune condition tendency), no organ problems

objective_data_offered.value: a red raised rash across both cheeks and the bridge of the nose that skips the creases beside my nose; warm but not weeping or crusted; no pus
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot palpate induration or examine chest/kidneys remotely
